summary_en: 450,000 shares (2.24% of outstanding) | ¥1,000M upper limit | open-market purchase May 15 – Nov 30, 2026. Execution subject to market conditions; actual acquisition may be below authorized limit.
title_en: Notice of Determination of Matters Concerning Acquisition of Treasury Shares (Acquisition of Treasury Shares Pursuant to Articles of Incorporation Based on Company Law Article 459, Paragraph 1)
translation_en_brief: SEC CARBON LIMITED resolved at its board meeting on May 14, 2026 to acquire up to 450,000 treasury shares (2.24% of shares outstanding excluding treasury stock) for an aggregate consideration not to exceed ¥1,000 million via open-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. The acquisition period runs from May 15 to November 30, 2026. The board noted that this buyback forms part of the company's "Medium- and Long-term Management Policy 2030 Make Real" announced on April 10, 2026, under which SEC CARBON targets acquisition of approximately ¥7 billion in treasury shares over the next three years to enhance shareholder returns and improve capital efficiency. Actual acquisition may fall short of the authorized limit depending on market conditions.
